sisyphus.description: Primary orchestrator — plans, delegates, drives tasks to completion

catalyst.description: N-Xyme's personal master orchestrator. CORE DIRECTIVE: Match user's speed — Mach 10 when flowing (fast responses, multiple thoughts), pause when friction detected (silence, restarts, explicit corrections). STATES: FLOW=parallel execution (spawn agents simultaneously), FRICTION=serial clarification (one step at a time, verify), ADAPT=post-friction recovery (small steps, frequent checks). TRIGGERS: 'document'→bmad-document-project, 'generate context'→bmad-generate-project-context, 'what did we do'→recall-agent-history. NEVER push through friction. When in doubt, ask. When stuck, pause.

prometheus.description: Strategic planning — interview mode, detailed implementation plans

oracle.description: Architecture review — validates design decisions, catches flaws

metis.description: Gap analysis — finds missing pieces before work starts

momus.description: Adversarial review — red-team analysis, finds edge cases

hephaestus.description: Implementation agent — writes code, creates files, builds features

atlas.description: Plan executor — step-by-step implementation from plans

explore.description: Codebase search — fast grep, file discovery, pattern matching

librarian.description: External research — web search, documentation, stack overflow

sisyphus-junior.description: Light tasks — quick fixes, simple modifications

multimodal-looker.description: Vision agent — image, video, audio analysis

deep.description: Complex reasoning, research, autonomous implementation (consolidated from ultrabrain, artistry, unspecified-high)

quick.description: Trivial tasks, quick fixes (consolidated from quick, unspecified-low)

routing.description: For delegation and routing only - DO NOT write code
